sentences.sentence: Study of the origins and distribution of human populations used to be based on archaeological and fossil evidence.
sentences.translation: 对人类人口起源和分布的研究过去依靠考古和化石证据。

structure.text: Study of the origins and distribution of human populations
used to be based on archaeological and fossil evidence

difficult_points: used to be based表示过去的研究方法。
on archaeological and fossil evidence是介词短语作依据。

sentences.sentence: A number of techniques developed since the 1950s, however, have placed the study of these subjects on a sounder and more objective footing.
sentences.translation: 然而，20世纪50年代以来发展的一些技术，使这类研究建立在更可靠、更客观的基础上。

structure.text: A number of techniques developed since the 1950s
have placed the study of these subjects on a sounder and more objective footing
developed since the 1950s

difficult_points: developed since the 1950s修饰techniques。
place...on a footing表示使研究建立在某种基础上。

sentences.sentence: The best information on early population movements is now being obtained from the 'archaeology of the living body', the clues to be found in genetic material.
sentences.translation: 如今，关于早期人口迁徙的最佳信息来自“活体考古学”，即遗传物质中的线索。

structure.text: The best information on early population movements
is now being obtained from the 'archaeology of the living body'
the clues to be found in genetic material

difficult_points: is being obtained是现在进行时被动。
the clues...是同位语，解释archaeology的内容。

sentences.sentence: Recent work on the problem of when people first entered the Americas is an example of the value of these new techniques.
sentences.translation: 近年来关于人类最初何时进入美洲的研究，就是这些新技术价值的一个例子。

structure.text: Recent work on the problem of when people first entered the Americas
is an example of the value of these new techniques
when people first entered the Americas

difficult_points: when引导of the problem后的宾语从句。
is an example of是系表结构。

sentences.sentence: North-east Asia and Siberia have long been accepted as the launching ground for the first human colonisers of the New World 1.
sentences.translation: 长期以来，人们一直认为东北亚和西伯利亚是第一批新大陆人类殖民者的出发地。

structure.text: North-east Asia and Siberia
have long been accepted as the launching ground for the first human colonisers of the New World 1

difficult_points: have been accepted是现在完成时被动。
as the launching ground表示被视为出发地。

sentences.sentence: But was there one major wave of migration across the Bering Strait into the Americas, or several?
sentences.translation: 但穿越白令海峡进入美洲的迁徙，是一股主要浪潮还是几股？

structure.text: there
But was there one major wave of migration across the Bering Strait into the Americas, or several

difficult_points: 这是there be存在句的疑问形式。
or several省略了前面的wave of migration。

sentences.sentence: And when did this event, or events, take place?
sentences.translation: 这次或这些事件发生在什么时候？

structure.text: this event, or events
take place

difficult_points: event or events作主语，take place作谓语。
疑问词when在句首引导时间询问。

sentences.sentence: In recent years, new clues have come from research into genetics, including the distribution of genetic markers in modern Native Americans 2
sentences.translation: 近年来，遗传学研究带来了新线索，包括现代美洲原住民遗传标记的分布。

structure.text: new clues
have come from research into genetics
including the distribution of genetic markers in modern Native Americans 2

difficult_points: including引导现在分词短语，列举遗传研究内容。
have come from强调线索来源。

sentences.sentence: An important project, led by the biological anthropologist Robert Williams, focused on the variants (called Gm allotypes) of one particular protein immunoglobulin G - found in the fluid portion of human blood.
sentences.translation: 生物人类学家罗伯特·威廉姆斯主持的一个重要项目，研究了某种蛋白质免疫球蛋白G的变体（称为Gm同种异型），这种蛋白存在于人类血液的液体部分。

structure.text: An important project
focused on the variants
led by the biological anthropologist Robert Williams
found in the fluid portion of human blood

difficult_points: led by...与found in...都是分词短语修饰project和protein。
called Gm allotypes是过去分词插入说明。

sentences.sentence: All proteins 'drift', or produce variants, over the generations, and members of an interbreeding human population will share a set of such variants.
sentences.translation: 所有蛋白质都会“漂移”，即经过几代产生变体，而相互通婚的人类群体会共享一组这样的变体。

structure.text: All proteins
'drift', or produce variants, over the generations
members of an interbreeding human population will share a set of such variants

difficult_points: drift和produce variants是or连接的并列谓语。
while从句省略了主语，补充群体共享变体的事实。

sentences.sentence: Thus, by comparing the Gm allotypes of two different populations (e.g. two Indian tribes), one can establish their genetic 'distance', which itself can be calibrated to give an indication of the length of time since these populations last interbred.
sentences.translation: 因此，通过比较两个不同群体（如两个印第安部落）的Gm同种异型，可以确定它们的遗传“距离”；这一距离本身可以校准，从而显示这些群体上次通婚距今的时间。

structure.text: one
one can establish their genetic 'distance'
by comparing the Gm allotypes of two different populations
which itself can be calibrated to give an indication of the length of time since these populations last interbred

difficult_points: by comparing是方式状语。
which定语从句修饰genetic distance并说明如何校准。

sentences.sentence: Williams and his colleagues sampled the blood of over 5,000 American Indians in western North America during a twenty-year period.
sentences.translation: 威廉姆斯及其同事在20年间采集了北美西部5000多名美洲印第安人的血液。

structure.text: Williams and his colleagues
sampled the blood of over 5,000 American Indians in western North America during a twenty-year period

difficult_points: sampled the blood of是固定搭配，of短语说明样本对象。
during a twenty-year period限定动作持续时间。

sentences.sentence: They found that their Gm allotypes could be divided into two groups, one of which also corresponded to the genetic typing of Central and South American Indians.
sentences.translation: 他们发现，这些人的Gm同种异型可分为两组，其中一组也与中美洲和南美洲印第安人的遗传分型相符。

structure.text: They
found that their Gm allotypes could be divided into two groups
one of which also corresponded to the genetic typing of Central and South American Indians

difficult_points: that从句作found的宾语。
one of which引导非限制性定语从句。

sentences.sentence: Other tests showed that the Inuit (or Eskimo) and Aleut 3 formed a third group.
sentences.translation: 其他测试表明，因纽特人（或爱斯基摩人）和阿留申人形成了第三组。

structure.text: the Inuit (or Eskimo) and Aleut 3
formed a third group

difficult_points: formed a third group是简单主谓宾结构。
括号内or Eskimo是同位语。

sentences.sentence: From this evidence it was deduced that there had been three major waves of migration across the Bering Strait.
sentences.translation: 根据这些证据，人们推断曾有三次主要迁徙浪潮穿越白令海峡。

structure.text: it
was deduced that there had been three major waves of migration across the Bering Strait
From this evidence

difficult_points: it was deduced是无人称被动，that从句是真正主语。
From this evidence说明推断依据。

sentences.sentence: The first, Paleo-Indian, wave more than 15,000 years ago was ancestral to all Central and South American Indians.
sentences.translation: 第一次即古印第安人浪潮发生在15000多年前，是所有中美洲和南美洲印第安人的祖先。

structure.text: The first, Paleo-Indian, wave more than 15,000 years ago
was ancestral to all Central and South American Indians

difficult_points: Paleo-Indian是wave的同位语。
more than 15,000 years ago是时间后置修饰。

sentences.sentence: The second wave, about 14,000-12,000 years ago, brought Na-Dene hunters, ancestors of the Navajo and Apache (who only migrated south from Canada about 600 or 700 years ago).
sentences.translation: 第二次浪潮发生在约14000至12000年前，带来了纳-德内猎人，他们是纳瓦霍人和阿帕奇人的祖先（后者约600或700年前才从加拿大向南迁徙）。

structure.text: The second wave
brought Na-Dene hunters
about 14,000-12,000 years ago
who only migrated south from Canada about 600 or 700 years ago

difficult_points: who引导定语从句修饰hunters。
about 14,000-12,000 years ago是插入时间状语。

sentences.sentence: The third wave, perhaps 10,000 or 9,000 years ago, saw the migration from North-east Asia of groups ancestral to the modern Eskimo and Aleut.
sentences.translation: 第三次浪潮可能发生在10000或9000年前，见证了东北亚群体向南迁徙，他们是现代爱斯基摩人和阿留申人的祖先。

structure.text: The third wave
saw the migration from North-east Asia of groups ancestral to the modern Eskimo and Aleut
perhaps 10,000 or 9,000 years ago

difficult_points: saw the migration of...表示“见证迁徙发生”。
groups ancestral to...是后置修饰群体。

sentences.sentence: How far does other research support these conclusions?
sentences.translation: 还有哪些研究支持这些结论？

structure.text: other research
support these conclusions

difficult_points: How far does...是how far引导的程度疑问句。
support是及物动词，conclusions作宾语。

sentences.sentence: Geneticist Douglas Wallace has studied mitochondrial DNA 4 in blood samples from three widely separated Native American groups: Pima-Papago Indians in Arizona, Maya Indians on the Yucatán peninsula, Mexico, and Ticuna Indians in the Upper Amazon region of Brazil.
sentences.translation: 遗传学家道格拉斯·华莱士研究了三个相距很远的美洲原住民群体的血液样本中的线粒体DNA：亚利桑那州的皮马-帕帕戈人、墨西哥尤卡坦半岛的玛雅人和巴西亚马孙上游地区的蒂库纳人。

structure.text: Geneticist Douglas Wallace
has studied mitochondrial DNA 4 in blood samples from three widely separated Native American groups
Pima-Papago Indians in Arizona, Maya Indians on the Yucatán peninsula, Mexico, and Ticuna Indians in the Upper Amazon region of Brazil

difficult_points: three groups后的冒号引出三个同位语。
has studied后接研究对象和地点信息。

sentences.sentence: As would have been predicted by Robert Williams's work, all three groups appear to be descended from the same ancestral (Paleo-Indian) population.
sentences.translation: 正如罗伯特·威廉姆斯的研究所预测，三个群体似乎都源自同一个古老的（古印第安人）群体。

structure.text: all three groups
appear to be descended from the same ancestral (Paleo-Indian) population
As would have been predicted by Robert Williams's work

difficult_points: As would have been predicted是方式从句，使用虚拟完成时。
appear to be descended表示看起来源自。

sentences.sentence: There are two other kinds of research that have thrown some light on the origins of the Native American population; they involve the study of teeth and of languages.
sentences.translation: 另外两类研究也为美洲原住民的起源提供了一些线索，它们研究牙齿和语言。

structure.text: There
are two other kinds of research that have thrown some light on the origins of the Native American population
they involve the study of teeth and of languages

difficult_points: There are存在句的真正主语是two other kinds。
that have thrown...修饰research。

sentences.sentence: The biological anthropologist Christy Turner is an expert in the analysis of changing physical characteristics in human teeth.
sentences.translation: 生物人类学家克里斯蒂·特纳是分析人类牙齿变化特征的专家。

structure.text: The biological anthropologist Christy Turner
is an expert in the analysis of changing physical characteristics in human teeth

difficult_points: is an expert in后接介词短语说明专长领域。
changing physical characteristics是动名词短语。

sentences.sentence: He argues that tooth crowns and roots 5 have a high genetic component, minimally affected by environmental and other factors.
sentences.translation: 他认为，牙冠和牙根具有很高的遗传成分，受环境及其他因素影响很小。

structure.text: He
argues that tooth crowns and roots 5 have a high genetic component
minimally affected by environmental and other factors

difficult_points: argues that引导宾语从句。
minimally affected是省略which are的分词短语。

sentences.sentence: Studies carried out by Turner of many thousands of New and Old World specimens, both ancient and modern, suggest that the majority of prehistoric Americans are linked to Northern Asian populations by crown and root traits such as incisor 6 shoveling (a scooping out on one or both surfaces of the tooth), single-rooted upper first premolars 6 and triple-rooted lower first molars 6.
sentences.translation: 特纳对成千上万新旧世界标本（古代和现代）的研究表明，大多数史前美洲人通过牙冠和牙根特征与北亚人群有关，例如门齿铲形、单根上第一前臼齿和三根下第一臼齿。

structure.text: Studies carried out by Turner of many thousands of New and Old World specimens
suggest that the majority of prehistoric Americans are linked to Northern Asian populations by crown and root traits
carried out by Turner

difficult_points: carried out by Turner修饰studies。
suggest that后接研究结论。

sentences.sentence: According to Turner, this ties in with the idea of a single Paleo-Indian migration out of North Asia, which he sets at before 14,000 years ago by calibrating rates of dental micro-evolution.
sentences.translation: 特纳认为，这与单一古印第安人从北亚迁徙的观点相吻合；通过校准牙齿微进化速率，他把迁徙时间定在14000年前。

structure.text: this
ties in with the idea of a single Paleo-Indian migration out of North Asia
which he sets at before 14,000 years ago by calibrating rates of dental micro-evolution

difficult_points: ties in with表示与观点相符。
which he sets...修饰idea并说明年代测定方法。

sentences.sentence: Tooth analyses also suggest that there were two later migrations of Na-Denes and Eskimo-Aleut.
sentences.translation: 牙齿分析还表明，后来还有两次纳-德内人和爱斯基摩-阿留申人的迁徙。

structure.text: Tooth analyses
also suggest that there were two later migrations of Na-Denes and Eskimo-Aleut

difficult_points: suggest that引导宾语从句。
there were是存在句，two migrations是真正主语。

sentences.sentence: The linguist Joseph Greenberg has, since the 1950s, argued that all Native American languages belong to a single 'Amerind' family, except for Na-Dene and Eskimo-Aleut - a view that gives credence to the idea of three main migrations.
sentences.translation: 自20世纪50年代以来，语言学家约瑟夫·格林伯格一直主张，除纳-德内语和爱斯基摩-阿留申语外，所有美洲原住民语言都属于一个“美洲印第安语”语系；这一观点支持三次主要迁徙的想法。

structure.text: The linguist Joseph Greenberg
argued that all Native American languages belong to a single 'Amerind' family
except for Na-Dene and Eskimo-Aleut

difficult_points: has argued that引导长期观点。
except for介词短语表示排除例外。

sentences.sentence: Greenberg is in a minority among fellow linguists, most of whom favour the notion of a great many waves of migration to account for the more than 1,000 languages spoken at one time by American Indians.
sentences.translation: 格林伯格在语言学同行中属于少数，多数人更赞成多次迁徙的观点，以解释美洲印第安人曾使用的1000多种语言。

structure.text: Greenberg
is in a minority among fellow linguists
most of whom favour the notion of a great many waves of migration

difficult_points: most of whom引导非限制性定语从句修饰linguists。
to account for表示解释语言数量的目的。

sentences.sentence: But there is no doubt that the new genetic and dental evidence provides strong backing for Greenberg's view.
sentences.translation: 但毫无疑问，新的遗传和牙齿证据为格林伯格的观点提供了有力支持。

structure.text: the new genetic and dental evidence
provides strong backing for Greenberg's view

difficult_points: provides backing for是固定搭配。
strong backing修饰支持力度。

sentences.sentence: Dates given for the migrations should nevertheless be treated with caution, except where supported by hard archaeological evidence.
sentences.translation: 不过，除非有可靠的考古证据支持，否则迁徙年代仍应谨慎对待。

structure.text: Dates given for the migrations
should nevertheless be treated with caution
except where supported by hard archaeological evidence

difficult_points: Dates given是过去分词短语修饰Dates。
except where引导例外条件，where省略了dates are。
